mainEntity.name: What schema markup is best for AEO in Los Angeles law firms?
mainEntity.text: What schema markup is best for AEO in Los Angeles law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Attorney-specific schema like LocalBusiness, Attorney, and FAQPage markup communicates LA firm specialties, locations, and credentials to AI systems for rich snippets.[1][3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Implement JSON-LD for Attorney role, service areas (Los Angeles), ratings, and Q&A structures to enhance AI parsing. Test with Google's Rich Results tool. This directly feeds knowledge panels; update for new cases. Opponents may reverse-engineer your schema for competitive intel.[3]
